faqs.question: How much does cricket control cost in Graniteville?
faqs.answer: Cricket control services in Graniteville typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: What attracts crickets to Graniteville homes?
faqs.answer: Crickets are attracted to moisture, warmth, and food sources commonly found in Graniteville properties. Basements, crawl spaces, and areas near the Wildlife Refuge provide ideal habitats. They enter through cracks, gaps around doors and windows, and foundation openings seeking shelter, especially as temperatures drop in fall.

faqs.question: How quickly can you eliminate a cricket infestation in Graniteville?
faqs.answer: Most cricket infestations in Graniteville can be significantly reduced within 24-48 hours of treatment, with complete elimination typically achieved within 1-2 weeks. We offer same-day service for urgent situations and include follow-up visits to ensure the problem is fully resolved.

faqs.question: Are your cricket control methods safe for families and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and eco-friendly treatment methods that are safe for children and pets when applied by our licensed technicians. We can also provide organic and green pest control options for Graniteville residents who prefer completely natural solutions.
